```python
def shortest_palindrome():
    import sys
    S = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
    if not S:
        print("")
        return

    reversed_S = S[::-1]
    combined = S + '#' + reversed_S
    prefix_array = [0] * len(combined)

    for i in range(1, len(combined)):
        j = prefix_array[i - 1]
        while j > 0 and combined[i] != combined[j]:
            j = prefix_array[j - 1]
        if combined[i] == combined[j]:
            j += 1
        prefix_array[i] = j

    longest_palindromic_suffix_length = prefix_array[-1]
    chars_to_add = S[:len(S) - longest_palindromic_suffix_length][::-1]

    print(chars_to_add + S)

shortest_palindrome()
```
